title: codereview-P1 rendezvous frequency default
description: python/src/lichen/sim/medium.py:139 - Default None for rx_frequency_hz maintains compat but spec for CCP-9 requires explicit control vs data channel distinction in all sim calls (see da2q context in spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md:73). Update simulation.py node RX scheduling to compute rendezvous freq using hash(SFN, EUI). P1 scalability.
